items.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
items.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

items.title: Hegseth says clock paused on deadline to seek approval for Iran war
items.summary: The US defence secretary says the timer for the president to report to Congress "pauses or stops" in a ceasefire.

items.title: Violence in Australian town after arrest of man over girl's murder
items.summary: Unrest took place outside hospital where man suspected of murdering a five-year-old girl was being treated.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美密西根州立大學臨時換考場 竟是有人在教室製毒！
items.summary: 美國密西根州立大學（Michigan State University）近日緊急調整部分期末考試的場地，此前警方表示，在該校最大的教學大樓內發現一男子，身上攜帶了可用於製造甲基安...…

items.title: 土耳其51勞動節各地上街抗議遊行 警發射催淚瓦斯伊斯坦堡近200人被捕
items.summary: 土耳其全國各地1日有成千上萬人走上街頭慶祝五一勞動節，其中在最大城伊斯坦堡示威的群眾還被警方發射催淚瓦斯、噴防狼噴霧與推倒在地，數百人被捕。  根據土耳其的「進步派律師協會...…

items.title: 美國海軍引入AI技術  荷姆茲「獵雷」幾天內搞定
items.summary: 為排除荷姆茲海峽的水雷，美國海軍正加速提升人工智慧（AI）能力。根據最新合約顯示，美國海軍已與舊金山AI公司「Domino Data Lab」簽署近1億美元的合約，透過加速機器學...…
